common:class.#text: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
Electric power generation, transmission and distribution activities
Electric power generation activities from renewable sources

common:generalComment.#text: Describes the average electricity flow from wind power obtained by weighting different MW-class wind turbine installed capacity shares in China for the year 2024.
描述基于中国 2024 年不同兆瓦级风电机组装机容量占比进行加权平均后得到的风力发电平均电力流。

technologyDescriptionAndIncludedProcesse.#text: This model is a calculation model that synthesizes the LCA results of different turbine types using the installed capacity weighting method.
该模型是一个计算模型，通过装机容量加权法合成不同机型的LCA结果，背景系统为所有被加权的风机LCA数据。

dataCutOffAndCompletenessPrinciples.#text: 本清单遵循了既定的切断规则。在完整性方面，本数据集已包含所有已知的、对系统功能有显著贡献的物质流、能量流和排放流。

This inventory follows established cut-off rules. Regarding completeness, this dataset includes all known elementary flows, energy flows, and emissions that significantly contribute to the system's function.

common:shortDescription.#text: "2024 China Wind Power Installation Capacity Statistical Bulletin" [J]. Wind Energy, 2025, (03): 48-63.
2024年中国风电吊装容量统计简报[J].风能,2025,(03):48-63.

common:intendedApplications.#text: Intended as an average electricity flow with regional and temporal representativeness, for macro-level LCA studies or power system modeling requiring averaged wind power environmental impacts.
作为一个具有地区和时间代表性的平均电力流，用于宏观LCA研究或需要平均风电环境影响的电力系统建模。

publicationAndOwnership.common:licenseType: Free of charge for all users and uses
